upvoty.title: Remote Slave Console & ECU Information Access for Masters
upvoty.content: Another very useful improvement would be remote access to the console/log output of slave devices directly from the master account, similar to how it already works with AT One.This would allow masters to better assist slave users remotely and quickly understand what actions were performed on the tool.It would also be extremely useful if important ECU information could be viewed directly inside the portal, such as:Software versionHardware versionVIN / chassis numberECU typeRead/write historyError
upvoty.author: Bimmer Industries

upvoty.title: Offline Multi-Log Data Logging Support
upvoty.content: Another very useful improvement would be the ability to record datalogs completely offline, without requiring an active internet connection.Especially during test drives or in areas with poor mobile coverage, it would be extremely helpful if logs could be stored locally on the device and synchronized automatically later once internet is available again.Additional useful features would be:storing multiple offline logs in sequenceautomatic synchronization once internet is availablelocal storage in
upvoty.author: Bimmer Industries

upvoty.title: Unlimited Slave File Validity for Original Files
upvoty.content: Details:It would be extremely useful if slave files could optionally be set to unlimited validity — or at least allow unlimited reflash access for original/stock files.Currently, if the master tuner is unavailable or no longer responds, the slave user can end up unable to flash the vehicle back to stock. This creates unnecessary dependency and can become a serious problem for workshops and customers.Suggested improvement:Allow masters to mark files as:Unlimited flash validityUnlimited reflash co
upvoty.author: Bimmer Industries

upvoty.title: BMW CVN Fix to prevent failure of emissions inspection
upvoty.content: The Autotuner tool does not prevent the CVN from changing after a software modification. As a result, tuned vehicles fail the emissions inspection, which takes place every two years in Germany. For these vehicles, you always have to flash the stock software first in order to pass the inspection and revert to tuning afterwards.Other tools such as CMD, Magic Motorsport, or Alientech correct the CVN back to its original value. This keeps a tuned vehicle undetectable during the emissions inspection.
upvoty.author: Christian

upvoty.title: Slave management: decoding modified slave files
upvoty.content: It is really important to have an option to decode your modified slave files. Best example, client calls back and say he doesn't feel the power in the file. You need to be able to take the file you sent to your client, decode it and check that you didn't code back an original file by mistake. In this way we can't check.Thank you.
upvoty.author: ECU Remap Center

upvoty.title: Slave management: adding a possibility to view ECU ID data on slave file decoding
upvoty.content: Because of lot of virtual read protocols, we need to have control over ECU ID data (HW, SW numbers) and also VIN number. In that way we can avoid clients exploiting this loop hole. Best example, customer send VR read and say we have already tuned this stage 1, please add EGR off. We need to have an option to check if we tuned this car before and by viewable ECU ID data and VIN number, we finally can. If not, he gets stage 1 and EGR off for a price of EGR off.Thank you, please consider this as it
upvoty.author: ECU Remap Center

upvoty.title: Acdelco E38 OBD full read
upvoty.content: Hey guys.  I thought I'd see what an AT read looks like compared to the various other tools I use for this ecu and have some feedback.  The majority of others get the full bin, as does yours but only under backup in the backup folder. My question is why don't you just read the full bin rather than having it split in 2 sections? Then you can list is as cloneable over OBD.  I know it's completely unimportant, just a thought :)
upvoty.author: Julian

upvoty.title: MS 42
upvoty.content: Hallo,ich habe ein BMW 323i MS42 Steuergerät und wollte fragen, ob sich dafür ein weiteres Protokoll freischalten lässt.Falls ja, welche Protokolle sind möglich und wie läuft die Freischaltung ab?Vielen Dank!
